matching: A non-wild card may be played when its color or value matches the top discard card.
A wild card may be played on any top discard card.

actions.skip: Skips the opponent. In a two-player game, the same player gets the next turn.
actions.reverse: Acts like skip in this two-player implementation.
actions.draw_two: Opponent draws two cards and loses their turn.
actions.wild: Player chooses the next active color.
actions.wild_draw_four: Opponent draws four cards and loses their turn; player chooses the next active color.

win_condition: A player wins immediately after playing their final card.
